title: Optimized fps
body:
Neo/Forge Based Modpack featuring Performance mods to make Minecraft run faster 1.7.10 - 26.1.2

this modpack has been designed with improving performance of Minecraft as well as adding some QOL mods (Quality Of Life mods) to make life more easy. 

OptiFine alternative mods like custom mob models (Fresh Animations will work with this modpack older version might not like 1.16.5 or older), zoom, shader and etc.
